name: Neusoft Education Technology Co. Limited
summary: Neusoft Education Technology Co. Limited provides digital IT higher education services in the People's Republic of China. It offers full-time formal higher education services, continuing education services, and education resources and apprenticeship programmes in the areas of computer science, electronic information, digital media, information management service, and healthcare technology. The company was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Dalian, the People's Republic of China.
